message:
fix(mux,client): eliminate TOCTOU race and premature domain attachment

1. mux/lib.rs: get_window/get_window_mut had a TOCTOU race where
   contains_key checked with one read lock, then a new lock was
   acquired for the unwrap. Between the two locks, another thread
   could remove the window, causing a panic. Fix: use
   RwLockReadGuard::try_map / RwLockWriteGuard::try_map for atomic
   check-and-map in a single lock acquisition.

2. client/domain.rs: finish_attach set domain.inner = Some(inner)
   BEFORE process_pane_list completed. If process_pane_list failed or
   panicked, the domain was left in an attached state with incomplete
   pane mappings, making it unusable. Fix: move the inner assignment
   after successful pane list processing.

Validated: 301 mux tests pass, 10 client tests pass.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
